title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 413.195 - Impersonation of director or inspectors, prohibited
text:
413.195.  Impersonation of director or inspectors, prohibited. — No person shall impersonate the director or any of his or her inspectors, by the use of his seal or a counterfeit of his seal, or in any other manner whatsoever.
(L. 1983 H.B. 729, A.L. 1994 S.B. 729)
